feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Work center hierarchy migration object does not exist in S/4HANA 2023 version
entry.content:
During the creation of the migration object with regards to the work center hierarchy, the object didn´t list into the migration cockpit.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Grouping Key not found in BP vendor company view (S4)
entry.content:
Hi All,

I can't find the grouping key in vendor company view via transaction code BP. I am using the standard role from SAP which is FI vendor. I want to group all the open items into a single payment document even they are different vendor codes in F110 payment run. That's why I want to use grouping key.

Below is the screen from BP vendor company view - FI vendor role

I try to adjust the account group layout, layout per company code and the field grouping per BP role.

But still not work. Anyone can help?

entry.title: Is it possible to group all open items into a single payment document?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I get the requirement from my users, they want to group all opened item into a single payment document via F110 automatic payment program. Even it include multiple vendor codes, they want to show one payment document only. So only one bank account will be credit. I can't find any setting or configuration in FBZP, most of them related to how to separate the payment into different clearing document.  

Debit: Vendor code

Credit: Bank account

 

Current testing result

entry.title: Third Party with Subcontracting PREQ from Schedule line doesnt generate component requirement
entry.content:
Material type: FIn goods (QTY/Value updating- X) 

When  Requirement class No MRP indicator is "1"  : MRP run doesnt recognize the third Party Preq generated from Sales order schedule line  "DS" with Account assignment category "X" and the components dependent requirements (Planned orders) are not generated and requisition is  displayed in MD04 with exception 20 cancel process and 26 Excess in segment ( No other requirement exist.

After this , If Requirement class "No MRP" is changed to Blank then duplicate Purchase req is created with account assignment "M" derived from the Requirement class apart from the one existing in Schedule line in the sales order. This PREQ however generates dependent requirement and planned order for component on MRP run.
I already checked multiple blogs including this one which matches to everything similar, but it doesnt talk about component requirements for the subcontracting and MRP explosion.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/third-party-subcontracting-process-overview-in-sap-s-4hana/ba-p/13556558


Any help appreciated .

entry.title: How to get the certificate SAPSSLA.pse?
entry.content:
Dear SAP

When I run TCODE STC01,it happens  "@M4@ 2024.04.15 / 14:57:43    @5C\QError@    No certificate list found for >/usr/sap/S4D/D00/sec/SAPSSLA.pse<        @15@    2024.04.15    14:57:44    100028125"

How to solve it?

entry.title: Automatically bring the indictax to the ME51N
entry.content:
Hi,
I hope you are doing well.

Please if anyone know how to automatically bring the indictax from material master to the ME51N (creat purchase requisition).

Thanks a lot

entry.title: Adjust settlement rule automatically created in IM for AuC
entry.content:
Hi all,

I currently have a question in regards to WBS settlement to AuC in combination with SAP Universal Parallel Accounting. The current setup works as follows:

  1. WBS created
  2. Automatic creation of AuC when WBS is REL
  3. With first settlement to AuC the system automatically creates the settlement rule for WBS -> AuC for all Ledgers (with 1 row in the settlement rule and Ledger field empty
  4. Final to be put in the settlement rule and when WBS is set to TECO the value gets settled from AuC -> Final asset.

This setup is generally fine, but we have in some cases the special requirement that we only want to settle the costs on the WBS to AuC for some Ledgers (e.g. only for Local GAAP Ledger but not the Global IFRS Ledger) and for the other Ledgers the cost should be directly expensed (settled to a cost center).

The problem is that the automatically created settlement rule for the AuC always settles to all ledgers (ledgers field kept empty). Can I somehow chance this behaviour in the customization and get ledger specific settlement rules?

Thanks!

entry.title: Fiori画面の仕様 1809と2023で出力幅が異なる
entry.content:
担当者様

お世話になっております。

現在1809から2023へバージョンアップを計画しており、
Fioriで1809で使用しているアプリを2023で実行テストしましたところ、画面幅が狭くなるという事象がありました。（GUIでは問題なく表示されます。）
1809と2023でFioriの画面出力する際に留意する点がありましたら情報を頂きたいと思います。

entry.title: eDocument Saudi Arabia - Simplified invoice and Tax invoice
entry.content:
What is the difference between Simplified and tax invoice? Few customers without VAT number in master data but system considers their as tax invoice.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: BRF+ data Validation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have BRF+ table where i created decision table with three columns plant, profit center and indicator.

I have a condition for a PLANT and ACTIVE X indicator combination if the value already exists in decision table it should throw an error when user tries to create the same entry.

Input Fields = PLANT, INDICATOR

Output Fields = PROFIT CENTER

1)Plantprofit centreIndicator 
 Plant 11X 
 Plant 12XError - profit centre already active for this plant
     
     
     
2)Plantprofit centreIndicator 
 Plant 11X 
 Plant 21XPossible

I tried using Rule Set and Custom Exit but unable to validate existing entries using loop.

I am new to BRF+ Concept so any help would be appreciated.

Thanks.

entry.title: odata Metadata issue for standard service
entry.content: I am seeing an issue with the standard odata service delivered by SAP where function import parameters are not appearing correctly in the metadata. When I copy the standard project to custom and generate service, it shows all parameters as expected in metadata.

entry.title: Post asset acquisition back to old fiscal year
entry.content:
Hi All,

There is requirement from my users that they need to post the asset acquisition to year 2022, but my current fiscal year is 2024. I try to re-open asset year to 2021 in OAAQ and also re-open the posting period via OB52 to year 2022. But I still can't post the acquisition by F-90 with the error below. I check the T093C table and found that the fiscal year still show 2024. Is it related to the error? And any solution can get my expected result?

entry.title: Is the vendor grouping key obsoleted in S4 Hana?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I can find the grouping key in customer company view only via tcode BP, but I can't find the grouping key in company view of FI vendor role. Is it obsoleted in S/4 Hana? Even I make it optional for the Single pmnt, grp key, PM supl. Only single payment can be find in this automatic payment transaction screen.

entry.title: Erro no VL09 ao usar BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CONFIRM_DEC
entry.content:
Olá pessoal bom dia, como vai todos vocês ? espero que estejam todos bem !!

Ao realizar um estorno do movimento de mercadorias na VL09 utilizando a BAPI para criação da Delivery, estamos encontrando este erro.

Alguém já enfrentou essa situação? E qual foi a solução adotada para contornar o problema?

entry.title: Vendor Grouping key not work
entry.content:
Hi All,

I try to using vendor grouping key to combine different vendor invoice(different vendor code) into a single payment document. But it is not work as expected. I try to use company code, fiscal year and payment method as the grouping key. And I checked from the payment proposal, seems it is correct. But two payment documents have been created in the payment list. What I want is only one single payment document. Since I need to pay to multiple bank account, so I won't use alternative payee method.

entry.title: Data Replication Framework license
entry.content:
Hi team.

I need to replicate business partners, and for this I need to know this:
Does the "Data Replication Framework" tool require a license to use in S/4HANA 2021 systems?

Regards!

entry.title: Billing on Future Date
entry.content:
Dear All,

Recently I got a requirement to post my invoices from multiple confirmation of my service orders into different periods. So I set the Billing dates in Future dates. But the Program/Manage Billing Due list is always picking the current date.

Does anyone know if I am missing anything on customization?

 

Regards

Sambit

entry.title: Random product selection in SAP EWM Cycle Counting?
entry.content: If we are using EWM Cycle Counting and let's say our interval is 180 days for indicator "A". After the 180 days is up and cycle counting starts over, does the system pick the same products in exact same order for new count? Or is there a way to force system to pick products assigned to "A" randomly, which is what the business desires.

entry.title: How to add Grant role and privilege to the user, error 258 insufficient privilege
entry.content:
Unable to create views in FARCHIVE1 due to the error message 

[SAP AG][LIBODBCHDB32 DLL][HDBODBC32] General error;258 insufficient privilege: Detailed info for this error can be found with guid '3A75978E5E879244828150ABCA9C08AD'

 




------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Pricing Determination in SAP S/4HANA On-Premise System
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working with SAP S/4HANA On-Premise system and have a question regarding pricing determination.

Pricing Determination: I understand that there is an existing pricing determination routine in SAP S/4HANA. However, I am curious to know if this is the only way to implement pricing in SAP S/4HANA On-Premise system. Is it possible to use other methods for pricing determination? Can this be used as an alternative to the old pricing determination routine? As we are planning to do in Clean core way.

As per traditional way we can implement the Calculation routine using VOFM Tcode and configure the same in Pricing procedure.

Best Regards,
Padmakar Kudtarkar
